case_title: KRISS MIRANDA VS. BRIAN CHRISTOPHER FULLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE -UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (PROTECTED TIME PERIOD) / ( TIME PERIOD MARCH 1, 2020 TO SEPTEMBER 30, 2021) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL SERVED JUL-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER
DECLARATION OF NO WRITTEN AGREEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES. ALL AGREEMENTS ARE MADE ORALLY AND THROUGH REGISTRATION CARD ONLY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, UNIT 207; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, KRISS , AGENT FOR FRANCES HOTEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, BRIAN CHRISTOPHER
